auth.description.signIn: A focused workspace for courses, lessons, and progress. Sign in to continue where you left off.
auth.description.register: Join your workspace to enroll in courses, complete lessons, and track progress across the platform.
auth.description.forgotPassword: Enter your email and we will send a secure reset link if the account exists.
auth.description.resetPassword: Set a new password for your account. Use a strong password you have not used before.
auth.heroTitle: Learn with clear progress, focused courses, and less noise.
auth.heroPointProgress: Track lessons, completion, and learning progress.
auth.passwordHint: At least 8 characters, including one letter and one number.
auth.signup.confirmBody: We sent a confirmation link. Open it on this device, then return here to sign in.
auth.signup.confirmedBody: Your email is confirmed. Sign in with the email and password you created.
auth.signup.confirmedFooter: You are not signed in yet. Continue with your account password.
auth.signup.readyBody: You can sign in with the email and password you just created.
auth.forgot.successBody: If that email is registered, a password reset link will arrive shortly.
auth.reset.invalidSession: Open the newest reset link from your email. This reset session is missing or expired.
auth.reset.callbackErrorTitle: This reset link could not be opened
auth.reset.callbackErrorBody: Use the newest link from your inbox, or request another reset email.
auth.reset.successBody: Your password has been updated. Sign in with your new password.
auth.error.duplicateSignup: This email is already registered. Try signing in.
auth.error.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
auth.error.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Please wait a minute and try again.
auth.error.weakPassword: Password does not meet the security rules for this project.
auth.error.signupDisabled: New sign-ups are disabled. Contact your administrator.
auth.error.invalidEmail: That email address does not look valid. Check for typos.
auth.error.network: Network error. Check your connection and try again.
